rawContent: {"stage":"review","insights":[{"kind":"lesson","text":"Admin/superuser views often get stubbed with TODO initially — always verify the admin branch returns data, not just instructor views.","scope":"UI branching"},{"kind":"convention","text":"Design token warnings in lint are acceptable in this project (not blocking) — only actual errors fail the gate.","scope":"lint"},{"kind":"decision","text":"When roles share a route, branch on role at both API (data) and UI (view) layers to keep concerns separated.","scope":"auth routing"},{"kind":"convention","text":"Use Payload's `where` clause operators (equals, in) for parameterized queries — never string interpolation.","scope":"payload api"}]}
